comments: Approved based on direct verification. GIT_MASTER=1 git show --stat --name-only 70c3467 shows exactly three changed files: tasks/v0.7-m5-a-state-separation-roadmap.md plus allowed artifacts tasks/v0.7-m5-a-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.7-m5-a-result-review-packet.json. The execution-result artifact matches that scope. The roadmap explicitly defines the target state, intermediate/compatibility state, and rollback path for .agent-state/ separation. No physical migration was performed, no MCP/server logic files were modified, and no active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics were changed in this commit.
